tools.name: outlook_sender_digest
tools.description: Scan Outlook inbox and group messages by sender to identify high-volume senders (e.g. newsletters). Returns top senders sorted by message count with metadata for bulk cleanup.

query.description: Optional search query to narrow results. If omitted, scans all inbox messages from the last 90 days.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Microsoft accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_outreach_scan
tools.description: Scan Outlook inbox for senders without List-Unsubscribe headers (potential cold outreach). Returns top senders with message counts and sample subjects. Read-only - use outlook_archive and outlook_mail_rules for cleanup.

time_range.description: Time range filter (default '90d'). Accepts values like '30d', '7d', '90d'.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Microsoft accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.
